programmes.show_description: Deadly Target. A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head and the weapon lying nearby. Experts try to determine who fired the gun. S1, Ep16
Fatal Compulsion. Psychologists discuss the behaviour of serial killers, including Ted Bundy, Aileen Wuornos and Canada's Paul Bernardo. S2, Ep1
The Bloody Shoes. After the brutal slaying of a homeless man, James Tony Wise, the Portland PD turns to the footage from surveillance cameras to find his killer. S10, Ep16
One Hour In Omaha. Police retrace a 60-year-old woman's movements after she goes missing in Council Bluffs, Iowa. CCTV footage reveals the lies of someone close to her. S10, Ep17

Silent Killers. A trucker disappears - police search extensively only to find what they feared in their own backyard. And two sudden deaths are not as coincidental as they appear. S8, Ep7
Out to Kill. From personality profiles to DNA testing and fibre analysis, look at how the latest technology in forensic science helps criminologists solve a case. S8, Ep8
The Initiation. When a record store clerk is shot and killed outside a bank, surprising clues left at the scene indicate that robbery was not the motive. S5, Ep10
Domestic Terror. Specialised FBI teams root out and dismantle terrorist operations and put away criminals whose secretive cells are well armed and very dangerous. S5, Ep12
Cash In Transit And Tye Hawkins. Judge Rinder examines a terrifying armed robbery and the story of 10-year-old Tye Hawkins, who was knocked down by a motorbike rider in a hit and run. S1, Ep7
Lie For Me. An air force veteran disappears along with his savings. Detectives discover a woman has been draining his accounts, then uncover a conspiracy of greed and murder. S3, Ep6

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: FLRT 12. Police wonder if a young woman's personalised license plate, FLRT 12, makes her the target for murder or if a more sinister plot is behind the crime. S12, Ep5
The Three Of Us. A woman vanishes while on a Hawaiian vacation to celebrate her 29th birthday. Police trace her movements to a Waikiki hotel, covered by CCTV cameras. S7, Ep11
Ian Stewart. Bestselling author, Helen Bailey, was a wealthy widow. After finding love again with Ian Stewart she vanished. He helps in the search - but was it a cover-up? S2, Ep6
Body Type. Lindsay and Jason seemed to be on amicable terms after agreeing to divorce. But, a brutal murder suggests there was more to their failing marriage than meets the eye. S5, Ep3
Who Am I? Dianne and Donnie settle down together in a wealthy Chicago suburb. They take the appearance of a power couple, but behind the smiles are horrifying secrets. S5, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: We Found Bonnie. A family is torn apart when a mother in Florida goes missing. The case stumps detectives, who believe that only the woman's three-year-old son knows the truth. S1, Ep5
Stephen Downing. Judge Rinder examines the case of Stephen Downing, a 17-year-old boy who was convicted in 1974 of the murder of Wendy Sewell. S1, Ep8
Murder At Sunrise. In 2009, Philip Gattuso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo. When police can't find any leads, they turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video. S3, Ep6
Deadly Ride. In 2022, the execution of a rising cyclist the weekend before a race in Texas sparks a police probe that uncovers jealousy, betrayal, and obsession. S9, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Hollywood Horror Story: People Magazine Investigates
programmes.show_description: When hikers discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, the cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star.
Blood Bath. Mum-of-two Nikki Whitehead is brutally murdered in her own home. Police suspect she may have known her killer. Polygraphs and CCTV footage help reveal the horrific truth. S2, Ep9
Bodies of Evidence. Killers have many ways to dispose of their victim's remains, but these are often no match for investigators. S2, Ep2
Shreds of Evidence. It is the insignificant details that forensic experts use to recreate a crime and catch a killer - fibres from a carpet, a lost eyelash or a clothing fragment. S2, Ep3
The Green Carpet. When 71-year-old Cindy Mudd goes missing, the Kanawha County Sheriff's Office turns to CCTV to retrace her movements. S10, Ep18
The Kansas Pawnshop. When 56-year-old Andy McGuffee turns up murdered in his burnt-out home, the Oklahoma State Bureau of Investigation looks to surveillance footage. S10, Ep19

Raw Greed. Two men are found dead, beaten to death in the bar where they work. A local television station receives an anonymous letter about the murders. S8, Ep9
Murderous Attraction. A woman is rushed to hospital following a massive seizure that has caused her heart to stop beating. Her husband admits to poisoning her. S8, Ep10
Fatal Friendship. When a land developer finds his wife missing, the FBI suspects him of the kidnapping but they must keep their options open. S5, Ep13
Death Pact. In 1990, Chicago experienced a string of bank robberies. As the 'Bearded Bandit' became more sophisticated the FBI surmised that it could be a cop. S5, Ep14
Nathan Matthews & Shauna Hoare. When 16-year-old Becky Watts vanished without trace suspicions fell on her step-brother and his partner. Experts analyse police interviews for clues. S3, Ep8
Texas Rangers. Examines the history and modern evolution of the Texas Rangers, who were formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against attacks from natives. S3, Ep11
Unlikely Sources. How baffling crimes have been solved through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles and other seemingly meaningless objects. S3, Ep13
Not Forgotten. A man risks everything to find his sister's killer - can a sympathetic detective with a great theory help him? Plus, a sexual predator is getting away with murder. S6, Ep10
The Lady In The Woods. A family worries when a godmother never arrives for a baptism. Meanwhile a jogger discovers a woman's body off a remote road in Pennsylvania. S1, Ep3
Girl Gone West. While a young man worries about his missing sister, a young woman's body is found in the Arizona desert - and investigators begin the hunt for her identity. S1, Ep5
Her Whispering Bones. In 2005 Pamela Knight vanishes on her son's birthday and, years later, two men find the remains of a woman buried under an abandoned shed. S1, Ep6
The Old-Fashioned Way. In a small town in Florida, a pastor and his wife take in a young woman from their congregation. But when she disappears, things may not be what they seem. S1, Ep2
Arizona Horror Story. Three bodies are discovered in a burned-out home and a fourth family member is missing. Investigators embark on a decades-long manhunt for the killer. S1, Ep1
Behind Closed Doors. A family are discovered murdered in their quiet suburban home. When one victim is found still clinging to life, police launch a desperate search for the killer. S1, Ep3
A Shot In The Dark. After a nine-year-old girl is caught in the crossfire of a gangland feud, a specialist weapons team moves in to arrest her killer. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: A mother calls on Texas Ranger Jim Holland, desperate for his help to solve the cold case murder of her son Joseph, executed in the East Texas woods. S1, Ep4
The Daytime TV Killer. A man tries to fool a TV show into awarding him money. Three years later, he kills his partner then calmly lays a trail of false leads. Experts uncover the truth. S6, Ep3
